hero.title: Grand Polo Club & Resort
hero.subtitle: Where equestrian heritage meets modern luxury living
hero.description: Experience Dubai’s premier polo-inspired residential community. Grand Polo Club & Resort by Emaar combines equestrian heritage with modern architecture in a low-density, nature-focused neighbourhood.

overview.title: Equestrian Heritage Meets Modern Luxury
paragraphs: Grand Polo Club & Resort by Emaar is a modern tribute to polo and horse riding life. The Emaar Grand Polo community combines equestrian heritage with modern architecture, showing how a major real estate company in dubai can turn a niche lifestyle idea into a full real estate development.

The community is designed as a low-density, nature-focused neighbourhood with active sporting estate and residential harmony. Gated clusters with internal parks and amenities create a private, resort-style living environment.
quickFacts: Active sporting estate with residential harmony
Gated clusters with internal parks and amenities
visionParagraphs: Central polo fields, stables and clubhouse form the sporting heart of the community. The design integrates equestrian facilities seamlessly with residential areas, creating a unique lifestyle experience.

Green corridors connect neighbourhoods, while the clubhouse offers viewing points over the fields. This integration of sport and living makes Grand Polo Club & Resort truly distinctive among Dubai’s luxury communities.

developer.title: Emaar Properties – Developer Profile
paragraphs: The community is developed by Emaar Properties, a leading real estate company in Dubai known for projects such as Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Arabian Ranches and Dubai Hills Estate. Emaar brings its expertise in master-planned communities to Grand Polo Club & Resort.
The development follows Emaar’s focus on quality construction, well-planned public spaces, and sustainable long-term value, adding confidence for buyers considering Grand Polo Club & Resort.

lifestyle.title: Equestrian & Resort Lifestyle
lifestyle.subtitle: Residents can expect a low-density, green and resort-style lifestyle focused on outdoor activities, privacy and equestrian-inspired amenities.

detailsParagraphs: The community offers a unique blend of sporting facilities and residential comfort. Central polo fields and the equestrian club provide active recreation, while extensive parks and walking trails offer peaceful retreats.
Gated clusters ensure privacy and security, with internal parks and amenities serving each neighbourhood. The resort-style facilities create a vacation-like atmosphere year-round.
lifestyle.targetResidents: Families, equestrian enthusiasts, luxury home seekers

Adjacent to Dubai Investments Park with shopping and dining
25 minutes to Downtown Dubai via major highways

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Grand Polo Club & Resort

faqs.q: What is Grand Polo Club & Resort by Emaar?
faqs.a: Grand Polo Club & Resort by Emaar is a large equestrian-themed residential community in Dubai, featuring villas, townhouses, polo fields, a clubhouse and resort-style amenities within a gated master plan.

faqs.q: Where is Grand Polo Club and Resort Dubai located?
faqs.a: The community is located in the Dubai Investments Park area, near the junction of Expo Road (E77) and Emirates Road (E611), with good connectivity to Expo City Dubai, Al Maktoum International Airport and other key destinations.

faqs.q: What types of homes are available in Grand Polo by Emaar?
faqs.a: The project offers mainly 3–5 bedroom villas and townhouses, with different clusters providing varied layouts, plot sizes and orientations. Some higher-spec villas are positioned closer to the polo fields or key landscaped areas.

faqs.q: Is Grand Polo Club & Resort an off-plan project?
faqs.a: Yes. Grand Polo Club & Resort is currently being developed in phases as an off-plan master community, making it part of the wider off plan project in UAE market. Specific launch phases may have different timelines and conditions.

faqs.q: Who is the developer behind Emaar Grand Polo community?
faqs.a: The community is developed by Emaar Properties, a leading real estate company in Dubai known for projects such as Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Arabian Ranches and Dubai Hills Estate.

faqs.q: What kind of lifestyle does Grand Polo Club & Resort offer?
faqs.a: Residents can expect a low-density, green and resort-style lifestyle focused on outdoor activities, privacy and equestrian-inspired amenities, rather than a dense high-rise or city-centre environment.
